EmailTemplate.name: AN - Rejected Certificate
EmailTemplate.subject: You need to update one of your documents
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
REJECTED CERTIFICATE.
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
The {!b3o__Certificate__c.b3o__Certificate_Type__c} certificate has been rejected due to the following reson: {!b3o__Certificate__c.Rejection_Reason__c}.
Please follow the link below to upload a new certificate and proceed with your application. The {!b3o__Certificate__c.b3o__Certificate_Type__c} certificate is marked with a red dot on the document list.
UPDATE MY DOCUMENTATION
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to call us on 1300 034 494.
Kind regards, Your team at Alliance Nursing
